articles.title: Nvidia announces deals with South Korea's SK Hynix, Naver and Doosan for AI data centres
articles.description:
Nvidia on Monday announced deals with South Korea's SK Hynix, Naver and Doosan Group to build AI data centres and use the U.S. chip firm's technology, as it looks to continue driving the AI boom.

articles.title: Nvidia Expands AI Frontiers in South Korea with Strategic Partnerships
articles.description: Nvidia has announced partnerships with South Korean companies SK Hynix, Naver, and Doosan Group to develop AI data centers using its technology. This development is part of a strategic trip by Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to South Korea, aiming to enhance AI capabilities in various sectors.
articles.content: Nvidia has cemented its position in the AI industry by entering into major partnerships with South Korean firms SK Hynix, Naver, and Doosan Group. The agreements focus on building AI data centers and utilizing Nvidia's cutting-edge technology to driv... [662 chars]

articles.title: Korean Stocks Plunge as Tech Selloff Triggers Circuit Breaker on Kospi
articles.description: South Korean stocks plunged, imperiling the world’s biggest rally, as investors pulled back from artificial intelligence bets that have fueled the global bull market in equities.
articles.content:
South Korean stocks plunged, imperiling the world’s biggest rally, as investors pulled back from artificial intelligence bets that have fueled the global bull market in equities.

articles.title: Asia markets tumble as tech rout deepens
articles.description: Asian markets have taken a dive as investors ended weeks of the red-hot AI rally, while Israeli strikes on ‌Beirut sent oil prices and the dollar higher.
articles.content:
Asian markets have plunged as investors slammed the brakes on the red-hot AI rally, while Israeli strikes on Beirut sent oil prices and the dollar higher.

articles.title: Japan’s Stocks Set to Sink on Tech Selloff, Middle East Worries
articles.description: Japanese stocks are set to fall, led by tech shares, after strong US jobs data fueled expectations that the Federal Reserve will keep rates higher for longer, sparking a selloff in AI-related shares on Wall Street.

articles.title: Tensions Mount as US Faces Domestic and Global Challenges
articles.description: A summary of U.S. news highlights various domestic and international issues. Key stories include a judge blocking USDA fund restrictions, U.S. aid for Ebola in Congo, a missing U.S. student found dead in Japan, and tensions in the White House over AI policy and gun laws. Additionally, protests emerge against Trump's policies, screwworm cases in Texas, and heightened security at the NBA Finals highlighted.
